easy.title: Banker
easy.description: Wealthy, well-connected, but clueless in wilderness survival.

easy.title: Merchant
easy.description: Skilled at negotiation and supply estimation.

medium.title: Farmer
medium.description: Knows the land, plants, and how to make things stretch.

medium.title: Teacher
medium.description: Educated and respected—keeps the group's spirits high.

hard.title: Laborer
hard.description: Tough, but poor. Starts with little and works hard.

hard.title: Trapmaker
hard.description: Skilled with snares, though distrusted by others.

hard.title: Wagon Repairman
hard.description: Fixes wheels, axles, and even spirits—sometimes.
